title: Employer of Record Services in Vietnam
metaDescription: Employer of Record (EOR) services in Vietnam — hire employees without establishing a legal entity. We handle contracts, labor registration, social insurance, payroll and PIT compliance.

hero.title: Employer of Record Services in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: Hire employees in Vietnam without establishing a legal entity, while we manage recruitment, payroll and compliance on your behalf.

sections.heading: Expand into Vietnam without setting up an entity
body: An Employer of Record lets you build a team in Vietnam quickly, without the time and cost of incorporating a local company.
We act as the legal employer for your staff, taking on contracts, labor registration, insurance, payroll and tax compliance so you can focus on managing your people.

items.title: Initial Tasks & Implementation
items.desc: KYC checks, employee data collection and contract preparation aligned with labor law.

items.title: Initial Labor Registration
items.desc: Employee registration, company regulation setup and salary scale configuration.

items.title: Initial Social Insurance Registration
items.desc: Documentation for HR and insurance management.

items.title: Monthly & Quarterly Tasks
items.desc: Payroll processing, PIT calculations and payslip generation.

items.title: Outsourcing Service
items.desc: Salary transfers and labor dispute mediation.

items.title: Comprehensive HR Outsourcing
items.desc: Optional bundled payroll, insurance and recruitment support.

sections.heading: Why choose our EOR service
items: Global workforce expansion — simplified hiring and broader access to talent.
Cost reduction — replace in-house functions and cut overheads.
Compliance management — expertise navigating local labor laws and mitigating risk.
Efficiency gains — save time and resources to focus on core activities.

items.title: Submit your details
items.desc: Share your company information and hiring needs.

items.title: Book a consultation
items.desc: Meet with a bilingual business consultant.

items.title: Verify KYC documents
items.desc: We verify documents and create your company dossier.

items.title: Begin operations
items.desc: Choose a plan and start hiring in Vietnam.

items.q: Can I operate in Vietnam without establishing a legal entity?
items.a: Yes. With our EOR service you can hire and operate in Vietnam without incorporating, as we act as the legal employer for your staff.

items.q: Can foreign employers manage payroll remotely?
items.a: Yes. We handle payroll, PIT and insurance locally while you manage your team remotely from abroad.

items.q: What does the HR outsourcing package include?
items.a: It covers payroll management, social insurance handling, labor registration, tax filing and recruitment support, tailored to your needs.
